title: Mini Playlist Manager
author: Ahmet TANGAZ
description: A command-line music playlist manager. It keeps songs listed and allows the user to add, show, remove, and search.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Creates a .miniplaylist/ directory and an empty playlists.dat file.

commands.name: add
commands.usage: python minipl.py add "Dark Red" "Steve Lacy" "Dark Red"
commands.description: Appends a new song to playlists.dat with an auto-incremented ID.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Removes a song from the playlist by its ID.

commands.name: show
commands.description: Shows all songs in the playlist, one per line.

commands.name: search
commands.description: Searches for a keyword in song names, artists, and albums (case-insensitive).
